action.reasoning: Observation: Previous train.py crashed on `if action_idx == 0:` with 'ambiguous truth value' — action_idx is an array with >1 elements. Analysis: ShortestPathFollower.get_next_action might return a numpy array, tuple, or dict in this multi-agent setup. Decision: Add debug prints in train.py to reveal type, then handle extraction (if array/tuple, pick first element). Update predict.py similarly. Run train.py (3 eps) to validate, then submit eval with the heuristic controller.
